abstract.para: If you stopped &dlm; before putting the cluster into maintenance node, you can start it again when the cluster is out of maintenance mode.

topic.para: You can perform this procedure on any node in the cluster.

step.para: Log in either as the &rootuser; user or as a user with sudo privileges.
Check the status of the cluster to make sure the resources aren't in maintenance mode:

Start &dlm; and any &dlm;-dependent resources. If the resources are in a group, you can just start the group. If the resources aren't in a group, start &dlm; first and then start the &dlm;-dependent resources. You can start multiple resources at once:
Check the status of the cluster again. &dlm; and any &dlm;-dependent resources should have the status Started.
